background.natural_state: Graceful and eloquent, with a natural charm that endears her to others
background.secrets: Lady Elara is hiding a forbidden romance with a member of a rival noble family, fearing the consequences it could have on her family's reputation and political standing.
background.bonds: Duty to the Family - Lady Elara's foremost bond is to her husband and children, whom she will do anything to protect and support.
background.flaws: Pride - Despite her outward grace and poise, Lady Elara struggles with pride and can be overly concerned with appearances, sometimes prioritizing status and reputation over personal happiness.

background_summary.title: noble
